text:
EVAIOLIN:1.0 is a cover album by NAOrchestra (Naoko Ishibashi) consisting of musics featured in the Evangelion franchise with violin arrangements. https://vgmdb.net/album/74204 It was published by Jinnan Records on 14 November 2012 with catalog number JINN-0004. https://jinnan.official.ec/items/4766246
